meta.description: AndroidCompat constraint rules and pinned library versions. Update this file when Google changes requirements or when pinned library versions need bumping.

matrixConstraints.description: Controls which versions enter the test matrix and how combos are pruned.

agpGradleMinimum.description: Minimum Gradle version required per AGP major version.

agpGradleMinimumOverrides.description: Per-minor-version overrides when Google tightens the Gradle requirement beyond the major-version default. Checked before agpGradleMinimum. Key format: exact AGP version or AGP major.minor prefix.

agpGradleMaximum.description: Maximum Gradle version supported per AGP major version. Prevents pairing AGP 7 with Gradle 9 which never coexisted.

agpKotlinMinimum.description: Minimum Kotlin version required per AGP major version.

agpKotlinMaximum.description: Maximum Kotlin version that realistically coexisted with this AGP major. Prevents testing AGP 7 with Kotlin 2.4.0.

kspIndependentFrom.description: KSP versions >= this value are independent of Kotlin version. Below this, KSP used a kotlin-prefixed format (e.g. 2.2.0-2.3.9). At and above this, format is just the KSP version (e.g. 2.3.9).

libraryTimeWindow.description: Time window in months relative to Kotlin release date for filtering library versions. Lower bound = how far back to look. Upper bound = how far forward to look.

maxVersionsPerComponent.description: How many latest stable versions to pull per component into the matrix. Increase to expand coverage, decrease to save CI minutes.

pinnedLibraries.description: Library versions that are fixed across all combos — not part of the compatibility matrix itself. These are supporting dependencies in the stub project. Bump these when newer stable versions release.

statusPriority.description: How overall status is derived from individual verification stage results. First matching rule wins.

7.note: AGP 7.x requires org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin applied separately.

8.note: AGP 8.x requires org.jetbrains.kotlin.android plugin applied separately.

9.note: AGP 9.0+ has built-in Kotlin support. Do NOT apply org.jetbrains.kotlin.android separately — it causes: Cannot add extension with name kotlin.

agpBehavior.description: Special behavioral flags per AGP major version.
